meaning: n.<美口>怪人,疯子,傻瓜adj.怪癖的,疯狂的,愚蠢的
examples: Every family has at least one kook.
She seems like a kook, but she is just grand, really.
She is not a psychic, nor a homicide detective, nor a kook.
" I said, "Some kook who said one of the Beatles had been shot.
The Tea Party is not a kook fringe but is in the center of the American mainstream!
